metadata.title: backend/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pip/_vendor/chardet/gb2312freq.py
metadata.text:
<document_metadata>
sourceDocument: backend/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pip/_vendor/chardet/gb2312freq.py
published: 4/26/2026, 11:03:36 PM
</document_metadata>

# GB2312 most frequently used character table
#
# Char to FreqOrder table , from hz6763

# 512  --> 0.79  -- 0.79
# 1024 --> 0.92  -- 0.13
# 2048 --> 0.98  -- 0.06
# 6768 --> 1.00  -- 0.02
#
# Ideal Distribution Ratio = 0.79135/(1-0.79135) = 3.79
# Random Distribution Ration = 512 / (3755 - 512) = 0.157
#
# Typical Distribution Ratio about 25% of Ideal one, still much higher that RDR

GB2312_TYPICAL_DISTRIBUTION_RATIO = 0.9

GB2312_TABLE_SIZE = 3760
